title: Smoky Grilled Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing mexican salad with smoky grilled chicken, crisp greens, and a tangy passionfruit dressing.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Season chicken breast with smoky spices and grill for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a large bowl, combine crisp lettuce, diced spanish onion, and crunchy tortilla strips.
In a small bowl, whisk together passionfruit juice and a pinch of salt.
Add the grilled chicken breast to the bowl and toss with the passionfruit dressing.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional crunchy tortilla strips if desired.
